project.name: Module 6: Password Sets
project.description: Create lib/password-sets.ts — multiple independent encrypted bookmark collections, each with its own password. A 'password set' is a named BookmarkTree encrypted under its own password and stored under its own storage key. A lightweight manifest (unencrypted JSON) tracks which sets exist. The default set uses STORAGE_KEY = 'holyPrivateData' for backward compat. Additional sets use 'hush_set_{id}' keys. All functions return Result<T, E>. Target: ≤250 lines.
project.parent_plan: Hush Consolidated Build Plan — Day 3 (first third)

preserve_verbatim: Nothing — Holy PB has no concept of password sets.

falls_short.deficiency: Holy PB supports only a single encrypted bookmark collection under one password.
falls_short.hush_requires: Multiple named sets, each independently encrypted. Creating/deleting/renaming sets. Switching active set. Each set cryptographically independent.

do_not_incorporate: Holy PB's single-key storage as the ONLY pattern — preserve as default set, support N sets.
Any shared encryption key or master password across sets.
build_from_scratch: PasswordSetManifest type: { sets: PasswordSetInfo[]; activeSetId: string; version: number } — add to lib/types.ts
PasswordSetInfo type: { id: string; name: string; createdAt: number; lastAccessedAt: number; isDefault: boolean } — add to lib/types.ts, REPLACING existing PasswordSet type
setStorageKey(id, isDefault): string — 'holyPrivateData' for default, 'hush_set_{id}' for others
loadManifest, saveManifest, createSet, deleteSet, renameSet, listSets
saveSetData, loadSetData, hasSetData — per-set encrypted data operations

type_migration.action: Replace existing PasswordSet in lib/types.ts with PasswordSetInfo + PasswordSetManifest
type_migration.reason: Existing PasswordSet bundles EncryptedStore into the type (all-in-one). PRD design separates metadata (manifest) from encrypted data (per-key storage). Manifest stays small, data stored independently under per-set keys.

user_stories.title: Manifest CRUD: create, list, rename, delete sets
user_stories.description: Create lib/password-sets.ts with manifest management. Manifest is unencrypted JSON under MANIFEST_KEY. On first access with no manifest, auto-create default manifest with one default set pointing to STORAGE_KEY. Replace PasswordSet type in lib/types.ts with PasswordSetInfo + PasswordSetManifest.
steps: Update lib/types.ts: replace PasswordSet (lines 47-53) with PasswordSetInfo and PasswordSetManifest interfaces
RED: Write tests/unit/lib/password-sets.test.ts (// @vitest-environment happy-dom). Test: 'loadManifest creates default manifest when none exists'
RED: Test: 'loadManifest returns existing manifest when present'
RED: Test: 'createSet adds new set to manifest with isDefault: false and generated id'
RED: Test: 'createSet generates unique IDs' (10 sets, all unique)
RED: Test: 'createSet rejects empty/whitespace-only name'
RED: Test: 'deleteSet removes set from manifest and storage key'
RED: Test: 'deleteSet cannot delete default set'
RED: Test: 'renameSet updates set name in manifest'
RED: Test: 'renameSet rejects empty/whitespace-only name'
RED: Test: 'listSets returns all sets'
RED: Test: 'setStorageKey returns holyPrivateData for default set'
RED: Test: 'setStorageKey returns hush_set_{id} for non-default'
GREEN: Create lib/password-sets.ts with types, constants, and manifest CRUD functions.
REFACTOR: Extract validateManifest type guard
acceptance_criteria: PasswordSetInfo and PasswordSetManifest types exported from lib/types.ts (old PasswordSet removed)
loadManifest auto-creates default on first access
Default set isDefault: true, maps to STORAGE_KEY
createSet generates id via generateId(), isDefault: false
createSet and renameSet reject empty/whitespace-only names
deleteSet: data key first, then manifest. Cannot delete default.
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/password-sets.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Per-set encrypted data: save, load, hasData
user_stories.description: Save/load encrypted data for individual sets. Each set stores EncryptedStore under its own key. Uses encrypt/decrypt from crypto.ts (NOTE: decrypt() THROWS InvalidPasswordError — must catch and wrap in Result). Reuses validateEncryptedStore from storage.ts.
steps: RED: Test: 'saveSetData encrypts and stores under set-specific key'
RED: Test: 'loadSetData decrypts data from set-specific key' (roundtrip)
RED: Test: 'saveSetData for default set stores under holyPrivateData'
RED: Test: 'loadSetData returns not_found when set has no data'
RED: Test: 'loadSetData returns InvalidPasswordError for wrong password' (crypto.ts decrypt() throws — catch and wrap in Result)
RED: Test: 'hasSetData returns true/false correctly'
RED: Test: 'different sets cryptographically independent' (cross-decrypt fails)

GREEN: Implement saveSetData, loadSetData, hasSetData using crypto.ts encrypt/decrypt + browser.storage.local + validateEncryptedStore. IMPORTANT: decrypt() throws InvalidPasswordError — wrap in try/catch and return as Result error.
REFACTOR: DRY error handling
acceptance_criteria: InvalidPasswordError caught from decrypt() and returned in Result (not re-thrown)
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/password-sets.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Active set switching and lastAccessedAt tracking
user_stories.description: getActiveSetId/setActiveSetId for switching active set. Update lastAccessedAt on successful loadSetData.
steps: RED: Test: 'getActiveSetId returns default set id on fresh manifest'
RED: Test: 'setActiveSetId updates manifest'
RED: Test: 'setActiveSetId rejects non-existent set id'
RED: Test: 'loadSetData updates lastAccessedAt on success'
RED: Test: 'loadSetData does NOT update lastAccessedAt on failure'
GREEN: Implement getActiveSetId, setActiveSetId. Add lastAccessedAt update to loadSetData.
REFACTOR: Re-read manifest before update to minimize stale state
acceptance_criteria: getActiveSetId returns default on fresh manifest
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/lib/password-sets.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Module purity, coverage, and integration verification
user_stories.description: Purity checks, scaffold-smoke update, storage integration tests, full verification. NOTE: Playwright E2E deferred to Module 10+ when UI exists to exercise password sets.
steps: Purity tests: zero React/DOM imports, console.log, type suppressions, empty catches
Storage integration tests: manifest persistence across save/load cycles, multi-set lifecycle with real browser.storage mock
scaffold-smoke.test.ts: add password-sets.ts (LIB_MODULES = 10), exports test
Full verification: tsc + eslint + vitest + coverage + wxt build
Verify ≤ 250 lines, all functions ≤ 50 lines, coverage >= 80%
user_stories.verification: npx tsc --noEmit && npx eslint . && npx vitest run --coverage && npx wxt build

what_exists.crypto: lib/crypto.ts: encrypt, decrypt, deriveKey, generateSalt, verifyPassword, CRYPTO_CONFIG. Stateless. NOTE: decrypt() THROWS InvalidPasswordError (does not return Result).
what_exists.storage: lib/storage.ts (262 lines): saveEncryptedData, loadEncryptedData, hasData, clearAll, getStorageUsage, validateEncryptedStore, STORAGE_KEY='holyPrivateData', DEFAULT_STORAGE_QUOTA, RETRY_CONFIG={maxAttempts:3, delays:[100,200]}. NOTE: save/load HARDCODED to STORAGE_KEY.
what_exists.data_model: lib/data-model.ts (299 lines): createEmptyTree, getItemByPath, findItemPath, addBookmark, addFolder, removeItem, moveItem, updateBookmark, renameFolder, collectAllUrls, countBookmarks, flattenTree, generateId, normalizeTree, isBookmark, isFolder, MAX_TREE_DEPTH=100.
what_exists.bookmark_import: lib/bookmark-import.ts (191 lines) + lib/bookmark-backup.ts (~130 lines, split during Module 5).
what_exists.errors: StorageError (reason?), InvalidPasswordError, DecryptionError, DataModelError (kind), ImportError (source?, format?)
what_exists.types: lib/types.ts: EncryptedStore, Result<T,E>, BookmarkTree, PasswordSet (TO BE REPLACED with PasswordSetInfo + PasswordSetManifest)
what_exists.tests: 489 unit (27 files), 85 E2E. scaffold-smoke: 9 LIB_MODULES. Build: 594.45 kB. happy-dom environment.

what_does_not_exist.password_sets: lib/password-sets.ts does not exist. No manifest. No multi-set support.

forbidden_patterns: Throwing for expected errors (except crypto.ts which already throws)

outputs.description: ≤250 lines. Manifest CRUD + per-set encrypted data.

known_risks.issue: deleteSet orphaned data if manifest update fails

metadata.session_protocol: One Claude Code session. Read lib/storage.ts first. Commit per story.
metadata.quality_gate: All tests pass. tsc clean. Coverage >= 80%. ≤ 250 lines.
metadata.human_review_required: Manifest never encrypted. Default set maps to holyPrivateData. deleteSet order. PasswordSet type replacement in types.ts.

execution_rules.clarifying_questions: Encouraged. Key: modify storage.ts vs use crypto.ts directly.
